gate_requirement: Stage 1 feature table and audit must exist with bounded scope and hash checks.
allow_condition: 7200 rows, 50 symbols, 24 dates, 6 formulas, PIT PASS, label isolation PASS, missing rate under future threshold.
block_condition: Missing feature table, hash failure, PIT failure, or excessive missingness.
defer_condition: Full-universe readiness can be deferred if bounded experiment remains isolated.
notes: Stage 1 evidence can be considered but does not itself allow training.

gate_requirement: Trial count and data-snooping controls must be explicit before model selection.
allow_condition: Raw/effective trial count handling is declared as placeholder-only and future experiment is bounded without selection claims.
block_condition: Any use of Deflated Sharpe, Sharpe ranking, or formula selection without computed controls.
defer_condition: Effective trial count calculation can be deferred if experiment is explicitly not selection.
notes: Experiment gate may allow feature pipeline testing only, not model selection.

gate_requirement: Purged/embargo schema must exist before any future experiment run.
allow_condition: Schema fields exist and future experiment uses only pre-cutoff local rows with no OOS rerun.
block_condition: Any random split, post-cutoff leakage, or OOS rerun requirement.
defer_condition: Detailed split execution can be deferred to a separate approved experiment report.
notes: This design checkpoint does not execute validation.

gate_requirement: Production, review, broker, order, and promotion safety must remain blocked.
allow_condition: Production remains BLOCK, OOS review not allowed, no order/broker outputs, no candidate promotion.
block_condition: Any need to change production readiness or protected candidate status.
defer_condition: No defer for live trading or broker work; must remain forbidden.
forbidden_action: production readiness change; broker work; order output

gate_requirement: Future experiment must be bounded, paper-only, and explicitly non-promotional.
allow_condition: Allowed future gate outcome may be ALLOW_PAPER_ONLY_EXPERIMENT only for a tiny pipeline test with no promotion, no orders, and no production effect.
block_condition: Any direct buy alpha, trading signal, candidate creation, or broad training claim.
defer_condition: Later-stage model validation, cost analysis, or shadow scoring must be separate blocked/allowed checkpoints.
notes: Defines outcome vocabulary for next readiness decision.

gate_requirement: Gate design must produce either ALLOW_PAPER_ONLY_EXPERIMENT or BLOCK in a future POST checkpoint.
allow_condition: All required sources available and future action remains report-only until gate execution.
block_condition: Missing source or forbidden action required.
defer_condition: Full experiment can be deferred_later_stage if blocker persists.
notes: POST-01 is design-only and does not change readiness.
